3214520.name: Night Trail
3214520.description:
In Night Trail, you play as Adrian Holt, a 30-year-old man drowning in debt, who takes a job as a security guard at the abandoned Night Trail motel, hidden deep in the forests near the highway.

Ten years ago, this motel became infamous for its mysterious disappearances—more than 20 guests vanished without a trace, and now it stands empty, yet still guarded. On his first day, Adrian discovers old records from past security guards and guests, mentioning something unbelievable—a silhouette of a girl with red eyes.

Can Adrian uncover the dark secret of the motel and survive, or will his choices lead to another tragedy?

🔹 Explore the abandoned motel filled with mysteries and uncover the grim history of the disappearances.
🔹 Use surveillance cameras to monitor the motel’s dark corners and spot supernatural occurrences hidden from the naked eye.
🔹 Be careful: your footsteps and noises can attract the attention of the motel’s mysterious inhabitants, who react to every sound.
🔹 Make choices that determine your fate—escape, reveal the truth, or become part of the curse.
🔹 An atmospheric horror experience with tense music and eerie visuals, immersing you in the nightmare of Night Trail.
3214520.supported_languages: 俄语, 英语, 德语, 丹麦语, 繁体中文, 波兰语, 乌克兰语
